text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Happy birthday to you too, Ikuno.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still, a birthday's not all that different from a
normal day, is it? I don't really get why everyone
makes a fuss over it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...But, that's just my take on it. Does your
birthday mean anything special to you, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I suppose it does. At the very least, my birthday
certainly feels different from every other day.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Also... it makes me happy that you and I share the
same birthday.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? You're happy about sharing a birthday with me? I'd get it if you were talking about some celebrity, but...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There is a lot I've learned from watching you.
Therefore, I feel proud to share a birthday with
someone like yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...C'mon, you're making me blush! Let's talk about
something else!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still, I guess it is both our birthdays today, so why
don't we go have some fun?
